name: Mysterious Treasure
short_description: The goal is to defeat waves of enemies using abilities tied to your chosen element. Enemies drop crystals that fill your experience bar. Leveling up lets you pick new abilities or upgrade existing ones. Bosses drop anvils to enhance max-level abilities and increase power.
detailed_description: The main goal of this game is to defeat waves of incoming enemies using the abilities provided. The element chosen at the start determines the initial attack and the direction of upgrades for future abilities. Enemies may drop crystals upon defeat. Collected crystals fill the experience bar. When the bar is full, you level up, allowing you to either choose a new ability or upgrade an existing one. Anvils dropped by bosses can be used to enhance max-level abilities and increase your power.
